primary_text:
Come see where your food actually comes from.

Every product on FarmThru traces back to a named farm. A real farmer. A real paddock.

Bundarra Berkshires: heritage pork, outdoor-raised in Bundarra NSW. Collins Wild Caught: wild-caught salmon from the South Coast. Paris Creek Farms: bio-dynamic dairy from Meadows SA.

50+ farms. All regenerative. All traceable.

No mystery. No middlemen. Just food you can trust, collected from your nearest hub.
headline: Come see where your food comes from
description: Every product traces to a named farm. 50+ regenerative farms across NSW.
creative_brief: Carousel of three farm photos: pigs in paddock, fishing boat, dairy cows. Each card shows farm name and location. Warm, editorial feel.
